name: lintropy
description: Bundles the lintropy skill for Codex so agents can write, debug, and run lintropy rules with repo-local guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Lintropy rule authoring and debugging workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Use lintropy from Codex to write or debug tree-sitter-based lint rules, inspect ASTs with `lintropy ts-parse`, validate configs, and run targeted `lintropy check` loops inside the repo.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use lintropy to inspect this repo's rules, write or debug a lintropy rule, and run lintropy checks to verify the change
